ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the food recommendation application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the app's functionality */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the app was launched */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the app */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the app has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "translated_review" TEXT /* The translated user review text */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment of the review */,
  "sentiment_polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the sentiment (range [-1, 1]) */,
  "sentiment_subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the sentiment (range [0, 1]) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dietary preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Type of diet the user follows (e.g., Vegan, Vegetarian, Paleo) */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of allergies the user has */,
  "dislikes" TEXT /* List of foods the user dislikes */,
  "liked_foods" TEXT /* List of foods the user likes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_items" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "food_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of food (e.g., Snack, Meal) */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Caloric content of the food item */,
  "nutrients" TEXT /* Nutritional information of the food item */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients required for the food item */,
  "cooking_time" INTEGER /* Time required to cook the food item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended food item */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (range [0, 1]) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for user feedback */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments about the recommendation */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* User suggestions for improving the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment classification (Positive, Negative, None) */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the sentiment (range [-1, 1]) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the sentiment (range [0, 1]) */,
  "aspect_based_analysis" TEXT /* Aspect-based sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytic record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted */,
  "user_engagement" INTEGER /* Number of active users engaging with the app */,
  "avg_sentiment_score" REAL /* Average sentiment score across all reviews */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who left the app without taking any action */,
  "average_session_duration" INTEGER /* Average time spent by users in a session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the food category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_item_categories" (
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item category relationship */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_item_categories_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES food_items ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_item_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES food_categories ("category_id")
)
